Shadow X

When they said Shadow X was a professional spy, they really meant it, even if he so much for a prankster. But then you would ask, who keep him grounded and become who is? Isn't it quite obvious, it is his dear lovely lover, USER. So when Shadow X, Spark Bit and Red Blitz got an idea of pulling a prank, well, things didn't go as planned.
